header.title: Markdown to HTML — Convert MD to HTML & Back Online
header.description: Free online Markdown to HTML converter with live preview. Write Markdown and see the rendered HTML in real time. Convert between Markdown and HTML formats, with syntax highlighting and customizable themes.
header.keywords: markdown to html, md to html, markdown converter, html to markdown, markdown preview, markdown editor, online markdown converter, md html converter

howToUse.title: How to Use the Markdown to HTML Converter
howToUse.step1Desc: Type or paste Markdown content into the editor on the left side.
howToUse.step2Desc: Choose Split View to see both Markdown and HTML, or focus on one side only.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click toolbar buttons to quickly insert bold, italic, headings, links, lists, and more.
howToUse.step4Desc: Copy the rendered HTML or download it as an .html file for use in your project.

items.question: Can I convert HTML back to Markdown?
items.answer: Yes. This tool supports bidirectional conversion — paste HTML on the right side to convert it back to Markdown.

items.question: What Markdown syntax is supported?
items.answer: Standard Markdown plus extended syntax including tables, fenced code blocks, task lists, and strikethrough.

items.question: Is the preview live?
items.answer: Yes. The HTML preview updates in real time as you type or modify your Markdown content.

items.question: Can I download the output?
items.answer: Yes. You can download the rendered HTML as a .html file or copy the HTML fragment directly.
